scripts.desktop: if ! lsof -ti:3001 > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Starting backend...'; bun run packages/server/src/index.ts --mode api & sleep 2; fi && cd packages/app && npm run build && npm start
scripts.start: bun run stop && sleep 0.5 && bun run backend & sleep 1 && echo 'API server running'
scripts.restart: bun run stop && sleep 0.5 && bun run backend & sleep 1 && echo 'API server running'
scripts.electron: lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5; bun run packages/server/src/index.ts --mode api & sleep 2; cd packages/app && npm run build && npm start
scripts.electron:dev: lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.5; bun run packages/server/src/index.ts --mode api & sleep 2; cd packages/app && npm start
